stock_data.name: Stock Data Server
stock_data.description: S&P 500 stock market data including prices, fundamentals, and economic indicators

tools.name: list_companies
tools.description: List all active S&P 500 companies with filtering options

tools.name: get_company_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific company

tools.name: search_companies
tools.description: Search companies by name or ticker symbol

tools.name: get_stock_prices
tools.description: Get historical OHLCV prices for a ticker

tools.name: get_financial_ratios
tools.description: Get time-series financial ratios like P/E, ROE, etc.

tools.name: get_fundamentals
tools.description: Get balance sheet, cash flow, and income statement data

tools.name: get_economy_data
tools.description: Get economic indicators (treasury yields, inflation, labor market)

tools.name: get_economy_dashboard
tools.description: Get summary of recent economic indicators
